creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #3)
Ah.  Would we want to use "x11-themes/gnome-icons-cool-gorilla" since that was the original name?  Since it was in ports before, this is going to work a little differently as I will have to copy the revision of the original port just prior to its deletion.

If we go with the original name I'll just removed the original entry in MOVED:
x11-themes/gnome-icons-cool-gorilla||2011-04-04|Has expired: no mastersite

If we opt to rename it, we'll update the entry with the new name.

Knowing that this is a revival of the old port now may mean we will bump PORTREVISION of the original port after I copy it.
